extensionDescription.message: Filter out keywords in YouTube Live and YouTube Live Archive video chat.

optionsDescription.message: You can export your current rule list as a JSON file, or import an existing JSON file to restore or migrate your rules.

msgInvalidFormat.message: Invalid rule format in the JSON file.

msgInvalidStructure.message: Invalid JSON structure. 'rules' array is missing.

helpHowToUse1.message: Click the extension icon to open the popup window.

helpHowToUse2.message: Add rules to block chat messages. Messages matching active rules will be hidden.

helpHowToUse3.message: You can toggle individual rules or turn off the blocker completely using the top switch.

helpRegexDesc.message: If you choose "Regular expression" as the rule type, you can use patterns to block messages. Here are some useful examples:
